summary: A varied, fluid 4-2-3-1 (sometimes 4-4-2, 4-2-4 or 4-2-2-2) with wide play, fluid rotations and a man-for-man, high-risk approach at the back.
style: Fluid 4-2-3-1 (also 4-4-2 / 4-2-4 / 4-2-2-2) — wide play & crosses, fluid rotations (FB inverted, wingers wide), front-four central combining with fullbacks wide.
strengths: Fluid attacking rotations and wide play
Front-four combinations with fullbacks providing width

keyPlayers.name: Christoph Baumgartner
keyPlayers.note: 21 goal involvements in the Bundesliga, 37 chances created, 19 goal involvements in 31 Austria appearances

tactics: Rotate fluidly, get fullbacks wide and combine centrally with the front four, pressing to win it back. The man-for-man defending is high-reward but high-risk.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
